title: Align Python Meshtastic portnum oracle with Position support
description: Why this exists: after project-LICHEN-zte2.7 added Zephyr support for Meshtastic POSITION_APP, the Python interface oracle still expected portnum 3 in the runtime unsupported set. What needs to be done: update the oracle and run the Meshtastic interface test so full Python suites reflect the current no-hardware adapter behavior.
notes: Implemented in python/tests/interface/meshtastic/test_zephyr_unsupported_portnums.py: added POSITION_APP_PORTNUM=3, split catalog-supported (TEXT_MESSAGE_APP, POSITION_APP) from runtime-supported (POSITION_APP, ADMIN_APP), and assert the pinned proto values explicitly. Evidence: cd python && uv run pytest tests/interface/meshtastic/test_zephyr_unsupported_portnums.py -q => 1 passed in 0.02s. Broader affected slice: cd python && uv run pytest tests/tui/test_native.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/client/test_ip_coap.py tests/coap/test_transport.py tests/coap/test_udp_server.py tests/sim/test_api.py tests/sim/test_server.py tests/test_packaging.py tests/interface/meshtastic/test_zephyr_unsupported_portnums.py -q => 176 passed, 1 StarletteDeprecationWarning in 10.37s.
close_reason: No-hardware test oracle aligned with Zephyr POSITION_APP support and verified with targeted and affected Python suites.
